indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: A couch is not suitable for sleep as it lacks the necessary height and backrest support for comfortable lying.

indicators.name: hard floor
indicators.rationale: A hard floor is uncomfortable for sleep and can cause noise and coldness.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows prevent natural light and ventilation, which are important for sleep.

indicators.name: no curtains
indicators.rationale: No curtains prevent light control and privacy, which are important for sleep.

indicators.name: no bed
indicators.rationale: A bed is the primary artifact for sleep; its absence makes the space unsuitable for sleep.

reasoning_summary: The space is not suitable for sleep (primary) because it lacks a bed, has a hard floor, no windows, and no curtains. The presence of a couch instead of a bed further undermines the suitability for sleep.
